title: Metal Art Sign
description:
Τhese custom metal signs create unique decoration pieces that can be hung anywhere in your home. Made with 3mm white aluminum composite, these custom metal signs come with a beautiful white matte finish. Each sign comes with one mounting block for effortless hanging and is available in 11 sizes.
.:All custom metal signs include one mounting block, metal plate, and double-sided tape for hanging

.:Material: White aluminum composite

.:Matte finish

.:Available in horizontal, vertical and square options

.:These custom metal signs come in eleven sizes to choose from

.:Please note: customer assembly is required. For indoor use only
